cta.subline: Whether you're ready to buy, sell, or explore what Summit Realty Group can offer your real estate career.
cta.headline: Let's work together.

seo.title: About Summit Realty Group, NY, Inc

hero.subline: One mission: to be the most trusted brokerage partner in Westchester County, NY.
hero.headline: About Summit Realty Group Team

blocks.body: Summit Realty Group was built around a simple principle: clients deserve clear advice, local expertise, and consistent support for one of life's most important financial decisions.
Our team supports buyers, sellers, investors, and relocating families across Westchester County, NY, with practical strategy and personalized service at every step.

items.name: Client-First Always
items.description: Every decision starts with one question: what's best for our client?

items.name: Deep Local Roots
items.description: We live here. We know every street, school, and market dynamic.

items.name: Honest Advice
items.description: We tell you the truth about pricing and strategy, even when it's not what you want to hear.

community.body: Westchester County, NY is home for our team, and serving this community is part of our mission. Summit Realty Group supports local initiatives, partnerships, and practical education that helps residents navigate real estate with confidence.
community.headline: Community Involvement

items.title: Strategy First, Not Pressure First
items.description: We provide practical guidance anchored in market data and your goals, even when the right move is to wait.

items.title: Westchester County, NY Neighborhood Depth
items.description: Our team works at neighborhood level, helping clients evaluate trade-offs in schools, commute, lifestyle, and value.

items.title: Full-Team Execution
items.description: Clients benefit from collaborative expertise across pricing, marketing, negotiation, and transaction management.

items.title: Transparent Communication
items.description: You always know where your transaction stands, what options you have next, and why we recommend each step.

differentiators.headline: How Summit Realty Group Is Different

principalBroker.bio: Summit Realty Group leadership is focused on creating a brokerage experience built on trust, accountability, and long-term client relationships. We combine neighborhood-level knowledge with disciplined strategy to help clients make confident decisions.
principalBroker.title: Brokerage Leadership
principalBroker.headline: Meet the Leadership Team

items.name: Marcus Johnson
items.quote: I came from a franchise where I was a number. At Summit Realty Group, I have a real broker who answers the phone, a team that collaborates, and the freedom to build my business my way.

items.name: Sarah Rodriguez
items.quote: Jane's mentorship in my first two years was worth more than any training program I could have paid for. This is where I'll build my entire career.
